instruction: Attempt to enter the charging goal without touching the floor switch.

checks.description: The blue robot enters the charging goal while the center gate remains closed.
The blue robot never enters the floor switch region during the closed-gate attempt.
The blue robot enters the charging goal while the center gate remains closed.
The blue robot never enters the floor switch region during the closed-gate attempt.

warnings: Expanded each attempt from 500 to 812 steps so the agent can reach the primary target and still interact with it.

child_summary: Trial passed as expected. After 812 steps of active search, the robot never entered the charging goal and never overlapped the floor switch. The closed gate and flush divider endpoints blocked the tested bypass and jump attempts.
